title: Baseline toggle Button- Show / Hide
excerpt:
In the Gantt chart there is a Baseline Button that opens the settings 
It would have been great if the use of this Button would have been Show / Hide 
Button instead off referring to settings button.

posts.author: SharonZomerstein (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the Gantt chart there is a Baseline Button that opens the settings
It would have been great if the use of this Button would have been Show / Hide
Button instead off referring to settings button.
